name: Mutual Bus Corp
registry_source: NY DOS / Division of Corporations (DOS ID 3419927); secondary: opengovus.com, bizprofile.net
notes: NY DOS entity confirmed: Mutual Bus Corp, DOS ID 3419927, Domestic Business Corporation, filed 10/03/2006, Sullivan County jurisdiction, principal address 151-17 6th Rd, Whitestone, NY 11357 (the Vallo Transportation / Vallone family bus yard). CEO Phil Vallone, South Fallsburg NY. PO Box 110 South Fallsburg matches Vallone (Rolling V) South Fallsburg HQ. SAFER/FMCSA name searches for 'MUTUAL BUS' and 'MUTUAL BUS CORP' returned no records — no standalone USDOT found under this exact entity name. The entity appears to be an affiliated/holding corporation under the Vallone family group (Rolling V Bus Corp USDOT 526543 in South Fallsburg; Vallo Transportation/In State Bus Corp USDOT 4101148 in Whitestone; CitiBus NYC). Fleet/operations likely run under those affiliated USDOTs rather than a separate Mutual Bus Corp registration.

name: Rolling Bus Corp
officers: likely Vallone family principals (per affiliated companies)
registry_source: NY DOS / Division of Corporations (no direct hit on exact name); affiliated entity Rolling V Bus Corp is in South Fallsburg not Whitestone
notes: Could not confirm a NY DOS entity exactly named 'Rolling Bus Corp' at 151-17 6th Rd, Whitestone, NY 11357. SAFER name searches for 'ROLLING BUS', 'ROLLING BUS CORP' returned no matches. The Whitestone address is the well-known Vallo Transportation / Vallone family bus yard, also home to Mutual Bus Corp (DOS 3419927) and In State Bus Corp (USDOT 4101148). The closest active carrier on SAFER is ROLLING V BUS CORP (USDOT 526543) at 5008 Main St, South Fallsburg, NY 12779 — 252 power units, 190 drivers, intrastate passenger, ACTIVE, no current safety rating — but that is the Catskills-based affiliate, NOT a Whitestone entity. 'Rolling Bus Corp' as listed appears to be either (a) a naming variant of Rolling V Bus Corp, (b) an unregistered DBA/holding name within the Vallone family group, or (c) a list-row data error. Note: Rolling V Bus Corp was acquired by Beacon Mobility on 11/01/2023.

name: Johnson School Bus Kewaskum
fmcsa_address: N87 W17391 MAIN STREET, MENOMONEE FALLS, WI 53051
registry_source: WI DFI corporate records (per BBB profile, incorporated 8/21/1959); secondary: BBB Wisconsin business profile, SAFER
notes: FMCSA carrier: JOHNSON SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC, USDOT 99419, MC-376075. Physical address Menomonee Falls (corporate HQ), mailing PO Box 285 West Bend WI 53095. The Kewaskum terminal at 3618 WI-28 (matches input address 3618 State Road 28, Kewaskum) is one of ~10-12 Johnson School Bus terminals across SE Wisconsin. 257 power units, 243 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating (last compliance review 8/22/2012, rating issued 9/04/2012), USDOT ACTIVE. Founded August 1942 by Aaron W. Johnson in West Bend (converted milk truck + 2 logging trucks); formally incorporated as Johnson School Bus Service, Inc. on 8/21/1959. Currently led by Steven C. Johnson (President) and Dan Johnson (GM). 4 tow-away crashes in trailing 24 months, no fatalities or injuries. Direct WI DFI corpsearch did not return record (possibly due to name format/casing).

name: Inter-County Bus Corp
officers: James 'Jimmy' K. Smith Sr. (historical owner, deceased 12/03/2007)
registry_source: NY DOS / Division of Corporations (INTER COUNTY, INC. DOS ID 1637526, inc. 5/18/1992, dissolved 9/24/1997); secondary: SAFER, suffolk transit history, Babylon Beacon
notes: Most likely match for 'Inter-County Bus Corp' in Babylon NY: BABYLON TRANSIT INC d/b/a INTER COUNTY, USDOT 179137, MC-165332, at 243 Deer Park Ave, Babylon NY 11702 — INACTIVE in SAFER (last known 10 power units, 16 drivers). The associated business 'Inter-County Motor Coach Inc' operated 1922–2012 (per longislandexchange/business records, ceased operations 10/31/2012) and was owned by Babylon Transit Inc; James 'Jimmy' K. Smith Sr. was the longtime owner (died 2007). NY DOS lists INTER COUNTY, INC. (DOS 1637526) at 243 Deer Park Ave, incorporated 5/18/1992, dissolved 9/24/1997 — this is a related but distinct corporate entity. PO Box 17, Babylon address from input not matched to a SAFER carrier directly. No active carrier under 'Inter-County Bus Corp' exact name found on SAFER. Entity status: dissolved/defunct — operations ceased ~2012; SAFER carrier inactive. Confidence medium because input name and PO Box don't exactly match any single registered entity, but Babylon-NY 'Inter-County' bus operations are conclusively defunct.

name: Board Our Bus
registry_source: Maine SOS Corporations Division (no match located via accessible search); secondary: SAFER (no match)
notes: Unable to confirm any FMCSA carrier record or Maine SOS business entity matching 'Board Our Bus' at PO Box 1460, Portland, ME 04104. SAFER keyword searches for 'BOARD OUR BUS' returned zero records. Web searches yielded only an unrelated California-based 'BOB! Board Our Bus' / ridebob.com in Davis/El Macero CA — that company is NOT in Maine. No Maine SOS entity, no USDOT carrier, no operating website, no transportation directory listing found for any 'Board Our Bus' operating from Portland ME. Possible explanations: (a) name is a DBA or informal trade name without separate state/federal registration, (b) very small private operator below USDOT registration thresholds (e.g., a single-vehicle intrastate operator), (c) defunct/never-launched venture, (d) list-row data error or scraping artifact. PO Box 1460 Portland ME 04104 is a generic central-Portland PO box and does not by itself identify a registered carrier. Operating status indeterminate.
